stem: During the first month of sales, a publisher sold 800,000 copies of a certain novel. During the same month, 12% of the copies sold were returned. If sales and the return rate remain the same for each of the next 5 months, about how many copies of this novel will be returned to the publisher during this 6-month period?
rationale: Choice B is correct. Of the 800,000 copies sold during the first month, 12% were returned: 0.12 × 800,000 = 96,000 copies returned in the first month. If sales and the return rate stay the same for each of the next 5 months, then over 6 months a total of 96,000 × 6 = 576,000 copies will be returned. Choice A is incorrect because 96,000 is the number returned in just 1 month, not 6. Choice C is incorrect because 480,000 is the number returned over 5 months, not 6. Choice D is incorrect because 4,224,000 is the number of copies sold and not returned during the 6-month period (88% of 800,000 × 6).
